---
title: "Activities"
format: html
date: 2026/03/10
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

## QESIG - Quantitative Ecology Special Interest Group

<img src="img/QESIG_Logo_3.jpg" alt="QESIG logo" align="middle" width="120"/>

-   The aim of this group is to connect early-career researchers interested in Quantitative Ecology, Macroecology, and Data Science, to share scientific ideas, and to promote research collaboration.

-   QESIG is also meant to bring together PhD students, who share a similar interest and view on science – who value best practices on reproducibility, transparency, and open science.
    It is envisioned as several meetings per year for PhDs to share experiences and build a good peer-to-peer support group.
    
- The first meeting was held by LoQE at Kampus Hybernská CUNI on 11 December 2025.
